'''âw-p-v''' ('''kawapav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unapparel|unapparel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-p-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unapparel|unapparel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-p-v
|-
! Lemma
| kawapav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwapav|thiwapav]] || [[word:jiwapav|jiwapav]] || [[word:shiwapav|shiwapav]] || [[word:kiwapav|kiwapav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwapav|thuthuwapav]] || [[word:jujuwapav|jujuwapav]] || [[word:shushuwapav|shushuwapav]] || [[word:kukuwapav|kukuwapav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwapav|thuwapav]] || [[word:juwapav|juwapav]] || [[word:shuwapav|shuwapav]] || [[word:kuwapav|kuwapav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwapav|thuwapav]] || [[word:juwapav|juwapav]] || [[word:shuwapav|shuwapav]] || [[word:kuwapav|kuwapav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewapav|thewapav]] || [[word:jewapav|jewapav]] || [[word:shewapav|shewapav]] || [[word:kewapav|kewapav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowapav|thothowapav]] || [[word:jojowapav|jojowapav]] || [[word:shoshowapav|shoshowapav]] || [[word:kokowapav|kokowapav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowapav|thowapav]] || [[word:jowapav|jowapav]] || [[word:showapav|showapav]] || [[word:kowapav|kowapav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowapav|thowapav]] || [[word:jowapav|jowapav]] || [[word:showapav|showapav]] || [[word:kowapav|kowapav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwapav|thĂŠwapav]] || [[word:jĂŠwapav|jĂŠwapav]] || [[word:shĂŠwapav|shĂŠwapav]] || [[word:kĂŠwapav|kĂŠwapav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawapav|thathawapav]] || [[word:jajawapav|jajawapav]] || [[word:shashawapav|shashawapav]] || [[word:kakawapav|kakawapav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawapav|thawapav]] || [[word:jawapav|jawapav]] || [[word:shawapav|shawapav]] || [[word:kawapav|kawapav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawapav|thawapav]] || [[word:jawapav|jawapav]] || [[word:shawapav|shawapav]] || [[word:kawapav|kawapav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawapav|shawapav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawapav|goshawapav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawapav|gokishawapav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawapavnĂŒ|shawapavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawapavnknĂŒ|goshawapavnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawapavnĂŒ|gokishawapavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawapavshĂ«|shawapavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawapavnkshĂ«|goshawapavnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawapavshĂ«|gokishawapavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawapavro|shawapavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawapavnkro|goshawapavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawapavro|gokishawapavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawapavmu|shawapavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawapavnkmu|goshawapavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawapavmu|gokishawapavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawapavsher|shawapavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawapavnksher|goshawapavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawapavsher|gokishawapavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawapavng|shawapavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawapavnkng|goshawapavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawapavng|gokishawapavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawapavya|shawapavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawapavnkya|goshawapavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawapavya|gokishawapavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawapavyam|shawapavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawapavnkyam|goshawapavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawapavyam|gokishawapavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawapavnĂŒshĂ«|shawapavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawapavnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawapavnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawapavnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawapavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawapavnĂŒro|shawapavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawapavnknĂŒro|goshawapavnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawapavnĂŒro|gokishawapavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawapavnĂŒmu|shawapavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawapavnknĂŒmu|goshawapavnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawapavnĂŒmu|gokishawapavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawapavshĂ«nĂŒ|shawapavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawapavnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawapavnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawapavshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawapavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawapavshĂ«ro|shawapavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawapavnkshĂ«ro|goshawapavnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawapavshĂ«ro|gokishawapavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawapavshĂ«mu|shawapavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawapavnkshĂ«mu|goshawapavnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawapavshĂ«mu|gokishawapavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawapavronĂŒ|shawapavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawapavnkronĂŒ|goshawapavnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawapavronĂŒ|gokishawapavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawapavroshĂ«|shawapavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawapavnkroshĂ«|goshawapavnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawapavroshĂ«|gokishawapavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawapavromu|shawapavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawapavnkromu|goshawapavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawapavromu|gokishawapavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawapavmunĂŒ|shawapavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawapavnkmunĂŒ|goshawapavnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawapavmunĂŒ|gokishawapavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawapavmushĂ«|shawapavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawapavnkmushĂ«|goshawapavnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawapavmushĂ«|gokishawapavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawapavmuro|shawapavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawapavnkmuro|goshawapavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawapavmuro|gokishawapavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
